name: Feature request

title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / job to be done

What user problem does this solve? Phrase it as a Job To Be Done where possible.

## Proposed capability

Describe the capability at the product level (not implementation).

## Coherence gate (from Chapter 1 section 1.5.3)

- [ ] **Vision fit** — it directly serves the NOVA vision statement
- [ ] **Principle compliance** — it violates none of the nine ordered principles
- [ ] **Anti-scope check** — it does not push NOVA toward the anti-scope (multi-user, cloud-first, data monetization, engagement machine, etc.)
- [ ] **Identity strengthening** — it makes NOVA more itself, not merely more

> A proposal that fails any of the first three is rejected. One that passes 1-3 but
> fails 4 is deferred, not built.

## Which persona(s) does this serve?

Developer / Student / Content Creator / Business Professional / Researcher /
Photographer / Family User / Power User.

## Which module(s) would it touch?

(Provisional module names, pending Chapter 6.)

## Alternatives considered

What else was considered and why this is preferred.
